When astrology explains your team better than an icebreaker. ✨

node.text:
@microsoft just launched Cyber Pulse, a new site designed to help leaders stay ahead of today’s biggest cybersecurity and AI challenges.
 
To mark the launch, I sat down with Vasu Jakkal Corporate Vice President of Microsoft Security, for rapid fire cybersecurity questions on what’s top of mind right now, from AI agents to trust, visibility, and control. And yes, we talk about whether she uses public WiFi 👀 
Watch the full conversation on Cyber Pulse. Link in my bio.
 
Follow @cybersecuritygirl for more practical cyber tips. #MicrosoftPartner

node.text:
Microsoft is working with ALERTCalifornia and UC San Diego, combining Azure cloud and AI with a powerful camera network to give first responders earlier, clearer situational awareness, often before the first 911 call. That early insight can help stop small fires from becoming devastating ones and better support those protecting lives, homes, and communities. 

@alertcalifornia @microsoft @ucsandiego @microsoftazure

node.text:
AI isn’t just another tool.
It’s a foundational technology we’re rebuilding the world on top of. The more we understand it, the better equipped we are to shape it. 

I’m excited to announce my new series with @microsoft , On Second Thought. 

It’s a space to slow down, ask harder questions, and think more carefully about how this technology is shaping work, science, healthcare, and access.

This technology is a really big deal. It deserves a second thought. #microsoftpartner

Comment “Microsoft” and I will DM you the link to the series!

node.text: “We’re really diverse yet medicine has to operate off of averages.” Futurist @sineadbovell explores with Microsoft’s Jonathan Carlson how AI is helping to unlock a new era of personalized medicine. Watch episode 1, live now at the link in bio.

node.text: Big questions don’t need faster answers, they need better ones 👀. On Second Thought with @sineadbovell explores the complexity and possibility of what’s next.
Melissa gets it.​

node.text: Christina designed a water bottle with her feet after arm paralysis from ALS changed how she interacts with the world. Alongside other creators at Microsoft, these experiences drive inclusive design and innovation. 💞 Full episode at the link in bio.

node.text:
Can AI help understand cancer?

Experts at Microsoft Research have developed GigaTIME - an AI tool that advances cancer research and could unlock access to better treatment. You can read more about it in the link in my bio!

node.text: From logistics and chip design to DNA sequencing and financial services, optimization problems power the world. And now, analog optical computers promise to solve these challenges faster and with less energy.

node.text: From 1s and 0s to computing with light, the future of tech is here with analog optical computers and they can reduce energy use by 100x. 🖥️ Full episode at the link in bio.

node.text: Everything is awesome at the Microsoft datacenter of the future. ✨🧱 #MSIgnite

Work IQ is the intelligence layer that powers Microsoft 365 Copilot and agents to:

Know you, your role, your company ✅
Connect emails, files, meetings, chats ✅
Learn your style, predict your next move ✅

The future of work? Intuitive. Personalized. Built around you.​
Work smarter, innovate faster. #MSIgnite spotlights AI’s journey from idea to real-world change. More details at the link in bio.

node.text:
Introducing the Pantone Palette Generator, now in beta within Pantone Connect.✨🎨

Drawing on decades of Pantone Color Institute research in color psychology and trend forecasting, this chat-based tool is powered by @microsoft Azure OpenAI and helps designers explore Pantone-curated color palettes, surface expert insights, and generate ideas faster — giving more space for creativity. 

Discover how human-led insights and AI come together in Pantone Connect in the link in bio.

node.text:
Mico’s lit, literally.

This Thursday, prepare to see the light.

Subscribe to our YouTube channel to watch. Link in bio.
Core memory 🥹
Me before and after I lit a candle for no reason.

node.text: So, do we agree to call them MicroCrocs?
The comments demanded them! The Microsoft Limited Edition Crocs Bundle is available for purchase. Tap the link in bio before nostalgia runs out.

node.text: 10/10 would host again with Copilot as my co-host. 🫶

node.text: Ep 3 | In Season 2 of The Reheat with @Keith_Lee125, we visited Tacotlán, a taquería built on hustle and heart. From viral quesabirrias to family-first values, they’re truly doing it all. We show them how Microsoft Copilot isn’t just for business, it’s for life.

Behind the baked chicken and collard greens dip is grind - inventory, scheduling, and recipe planning. In season 2 of The Reheat with @Keith_Lee125, we showed her how Microsoft Copilot can predict what ingredients she’ll need, when she’ll need them, and how much to prep. More at the link in bio

node.text: Ep 2 | Chef Royce is the soul behind Soul Prime, and she’s been doing it all. From the world’s best baked chicken to running the kitchen solo, her story is one of flavor, grit, and heart. With @keith_lee125 and Copilot, she’s finding new ways to balance the grind and the growth.

node.text: You better be nice!​

Cleo’s Southern Cuisine is soul food with a story. In season 2 of The Reheat with @Keith_Lee125, we show her how Microsoft Copilot can provide new ways to balance the heat of the kitchen with the rhythm of life. More at the link in bio

node.text: Ep 1 | @keith_lee125 knew he had to surprise Chef Harper in season 2 of The Reheat! Keith gave her the low down on Copilot and how to use it to spark creativity in the kitchen. But before all that – he needed to eat! 🔥
@keith_Lee125 is back. Chicago’s on the table. And the stories? Just getting started. Season 2 of The Reheat drops September 8 🔥
